title: DocuFlow

hero.title: DocuFlow
hero.subtitle: Documents, KSeF, rentals, and reporting in one workspace

description.title: One workspace for operational flow
description.lead: DocuFlow combines document workflow, reporting, sending and receiving KSeF invoices, payment statuses, a rental module, and secure document archiving in one product.

workspace.title: Daily operations without tool switching
workspace.caption: Main workspace and guided onboarding
workspace.p1: The app brings invoicing, documents, KSeF, payments, FAQ, and reporting into one consistent operational dashboard for both operators and business owners.
workspace.p2: It is designed for teams that want one practical control panel instead of stitching together several separate tools.

documents.title: Document workflow and archive
documents.caption: A hub for documents and daily operations
documents.p1: The documents module keeps invoices, files, and processing states in one place. Teams can move quickly from an incoming document to approval, payment, reporting, or KSeF delivery.
documents.p2: The focus is practical day-to-day handling, so the interface emphasizes readable lists, filtering, and fast transitions between a document, a company, and the next action.

ksef.title: Send and receive invoices through KSeF
ksef.caption: KSeF connection setup
ksef.p1: DocuFlow synchronizes with KSeF, supports issuing invoices to KSeF, and handles incoming documents. The workflow moves from invoice preparation to submission status and confirmation.
ksef.p2: The interface simplifies TEST, DEMO, and PRD setup so the current authorization state and company context stay visible while working.

invoicing.title: Invoice issuing and error handling
invoicing.caption: Invoice form, XML flow, and submission states
invoicing.p1: DocuFlow supports manual invoicing, file-based invoicing, and invoice generation from monthly reports. Teams can manage drafts, XML creation, KSeF submission, and status checks in one flow.
invoicing.p2: That reduces manual re-entry and helps operators catch authorization, session, or validation issues earlier when working with KSeF responses.

payments.title: Payments and reporting in one view
payments.caption: Payments and banking synchronization
payments.p1: The payments area shows banking history, document status, and settlement progress. After connecting an account, teams can sync history and match transfers against invoices faster.
payments.p2: Reporting helps turn operational data into practical dashboards and monthly summaries without moving information between systems by hand.

rental.title: Rental management inside the same system
rental.caption: Rental module with units, rooms, and tenants
rental.p1: DocuFlow includes a rental module for defining properties and rooms, assigning tenants, and generating recurring rental documents for the selected period.
rental.p2: That keeps rental operations, invoicing, and archiving in the same workflow, ready for later sending and audit-friendly storage.

blockchain.title: Document integrity and trusted storage
blockchain.caption: Secure document preservation
blockchain.p1: One of DocuFlow's distinctive features is the ability to store documents using blockchain-backed verification, giving teams stronger confidence in integrity and later proof of authenticity.
blockchain.p2: This matters wherever audit trails, authenticity checks, and confidence that a saved document was not silently altered are important.

keywords: DocuFlow, document workflow, KSeF, invoicing, reporting, rental management, blockchain, banking sync
